HGSS.488.0000:
I just recently became a Trainer.\r
My son encouraged me to do it.\f
I’m impressed by the selection of
convenient items.
HGSS.488.0001:
My dad’s having a hard time learning
the names of items and how they are\r
supposed to be used...
HGSS.488.0002:
Top Grade Items for Trainers!
2F: Trainer’s Market
HGSS.488.0004: Wake: Ha! This is quite a mask...\f
HGSS.488.0005:
Wake: Huh? You talking to me?\f
Your eyes...are on my
Crasher Wake mask?\f
No, no, no!
I can never let it go!\f
...
Huh? That’s not it?\r
You want the other mask?\f
Hmm.
OK.\f
HGSS.488.0006:
Wake: What?
That’s not enough?\f
You’re quite a negotiator for your
age... All right, I’ll give you this, too!\f
HGSS.488.0007:
Wake: ...\f
Arrr, all right, all right! I will give you
this much-valued one as well!\f
HGSS.488.0008:
Wake: It’s OK.
I’ve already paid for you.\f
Presents for you from the one
who wears masks the best.\r
Don’t be shy.\r
Ha ha ha!\f
HGSS.488.0009:
Wake: Hmm... Hmm... Humm...\f
Ha! This is quite a mask...
